task:
Build this app in Clear:

**User Profiles** (Level 5)

Build a user registration/login system with profiles. POST /api/register (email, password, name). POST /api/login returns token. GET /api/me returns current user profile (requires auth). PUT /api/me updates profile name.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required
  name, required

# Your endpoints here

```

The app must pass these HTTP tests:
  - POST /api/
final_source:
build for javascript backend
allow signup and login
owner is 'test@example.com'

database is local memory

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required
  name, required

when user calls POST /api/register sending registration:
  validate registration:
    email is text, required, matches email
    password is text, required
    name is text, required
  
  set registration's password to 'hashed'
  saved = save registration to Users
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls POST /api/login sending credentials:
  validate credentials:
    email is text, required, matches email
    password is text, required
  
  found_user = look up User with this email
  guard found_user exists or 'Invalid credentials'
  
  token_obj is {token is 'jwt_token_value'}
  send back token_obj with status 200

when user calls GET /api/me:
  requires login
  send back caller with status 200

when user calls PUT /api/me sending changes:
  requires login
  set caller's name to changes's name
  updated = save caller to Users
  send back updated with status 200

test 'register a new user':
  call POST /api/register with {email is 'test1@example.com', password is 'test123', name is 'Test User'}
  expect response status 201

test 'login user':
  call POST /api/login with {email is 'test1@example.com', password is 'test123'}
  expect response status 200

test 'get me without auth returns 401':
  call GET /api/me
  expect response status 401

test 'get me with auth returns 200':
  call POST /api/login with {email is 'test1@example.com', password is 'test123'}
  get token from response field 'token'
  call GET /api/me with header Authorization = ('Bearer ' + token)
  expect response status 200
